The HTML Maze
by kyrylo
◉ frozen archive

level 3 · 6,2

Chthonic Arcaneum

Vines creep seeking life.
Layout defies logical paths.
Whispers of roused Old Ones.
R'lyeh artifacts plague source.

Compass

N S E W
Go North Go South Go East Go West Go Up Go Down

Left click to draw ✏️, right click to erase 🧽
Your marks stay in this tab only and vanish when you leave.

Writings on the Wall

This wall is sealed. Nothing new can be saved.

  • NORTH. help me.
  • NOR- wait a minute i've already been here
  • NORTH NORTH NORTH
  • The message to turn back is actually legit. After walking in circles, it seems that you need to get back down a level.
  • This area is tricky. It's easy to walk in a circle.
  • Give a monkey a gun and he is free
  • Сидорову срочно явиться в деканат!

The HTML Maze was built in July 2025 and frozen on 20 July 2026.

by kyrylo ~ x · bsky · mastodon
